Phishing email analysis – sample IOC text fixture

The email originated from IP address 185.220.101.45 and referenced the domain
malware-delivery.xyz as a staging server.

A secondary C2 was observed at 91.199.212.52 communicating over HTTP on port 8080.
The full URL observed in process telemetry was http://91.199.212.52:8080/gate.php

File hashes observed:
  MD5:    d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e
  SHA1:   da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709
  SHA256: e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855

Email sender: attacker@phishingops.ru

CVE reference in lure document: CVE-2024-21413

Legitimate-looking URL included in document: https://login.microsoftonline.com.phishingops.ru/auth
